title: Resolve, to Honor Margaret Chase Smith and Joshua Chamberlain in the National Statuary Hall Collection
last_house_action: 6/9/2025 - FINALLY PASSED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.

actions.description: Committee on EDUCATION AND CULTURAL AFFAIRS suggested and ordered printed REFERENCE to the Committee on EDUCATION AND CULTURAL AFFAIRS Ordered sent down forthwith for concurrence
The Resolve was REFERRED to the Committee on EDUCATION AND CULTURAL AFFAIRS . In concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.

Report READ and ACCEPTED . READ ONCE . Committee Amendment "A" (S-202) READ and ADOPTED . Under suspension of the Rules, READ A SECOND TIME and PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED AS AMENDED BY Committee Amendment "A" (S-202) . Ordered sent down forthwith for concurrence.

CONSENT CALENDAR - FIRST DAY On OBJECTION of Representative MOONEN of Portland REMOVED . The Committee Report was READ . On motion of Representative MOONEN of Portland, TABLED pending ACCEPTANCE of the Committee Report. Later today assigned.

Speaker laid before the House Subsequently, the Committee Report was ACCEPTED . The Resolve was READ ONCE . Committee Amendment "A" (S-202) was READ . On motion of Representative MURPHY of Scarborough, House Amendment "A" (H-429) to Committee Amendment "A" (S-202) was READ and ADOPTED . Committee Amendment "A" (S-202) as Amended by House Amendment "A" (H-429) thereto was ADOPTED . Under suspension of the rules, the Resolve was given its SECOND READING without REFERENCE to the Committee on Bills in the Second Reading . The Resolve was PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED as Amended by Committee Amendment "A" (S-202) as Amended by House Amendment "A" (H-429) thereto. In NON-CONCURRENCE and sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.

On motion by Senator PIERCE of Cumberland the Senate RECEDED and CONCURRED to PASSAGE TO BE ENGROSSED as Amended by Committee Amendment "A" (S-202) as Amended by House Amendment "A" (H-429) thereto in concurrence.
FINALLY PASSED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.

amendments.label: C "A" (S-202 )
